title: Better Cosmetics
description: A better Minecraft experience with many cosmetics!
body: # 🎩Better Cosmetics! | What we add? **This mod adds many cosmetics and new weapons to your game.** _For Example_ ![MagicalThings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eadc3bae9feaa8dd218847e004c0ba77b9d9651.png) - Magical Hat - Magical Cloth - Magical Leggings  - Magical Boots - Magical Wand >      ↪ Shoots _**Freezing**_ ball **[3 Seconds Cooldown]** - Magical Card >      ↪ Gives _**Invisivibility**_ and **_Speed_** effect but _reduces 3 hearts_ for 4 seconds **[10 Seconds cooldown]** • _With new updates we will add new cosmetics and weapons._ _🔰 This mod is developed with ideas we received from our users. Don't forget to join our Discord server for this!_ # 📜 Crafting Recipes ![Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c2917865ad15cdeaa90d4712b898103e810a01a.png) # 🔨 Required Mods > You must download these mods to run the mod. # 🔨 Setup - Download the version you want and put it in your mods folder along with the required mods. Also, don't forget to download the relevant Forge version. # ![a](https://i.imgur.com/X6ZWRlI.png)
